channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting backs Burnham for return to Westminster, saying he is Labour’s best chance of winning byelection – UK politics live
item.description: Streeting backs Burnham for return to Westminster, saying he is Labour’s best chance of winning byelection – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Greens suggest they will properly contest byelection, in blow to Burnham
item.description: Greens suggest they will properly contest byelection, in blow to Burnham

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows
item.description: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘He’s just down to earth’: Ashton-in-Makerfield receptive to Burnham run
item.description: ‘He’s just down to earth’: Ashton-in-Makerfield receptive to Burnham run

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Trump warns it will be ‘tough’ for Starmer to survive as prime minister
item.description: Trump warns it will be ‘tough’ for Starmer to survive as prime minister

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Extraordinary intervention by the Intelligence and Security Committee, accusing the government of withholding files from them and making further redactions "far too broadly".
And the ISC made a critique of the decisi...
item.description:
Extraordinary intervention by the Intelligence and Security Committee, accusing the government of withholding files from them and making further redactions "far too broadly".
And the ISC made a critique of the decisi...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Ministers have no authority to withhold Mandelson vetting file, committee says
item.description: Ministers have no authority to withhold Mandelson vetting file, committee says

item.title: BBC Politics: What does Makerfield make of by-election and can Burnham win?
item.description: What does Makerfield make of by-election and can Burnham win?

item.title: BBC Politics: What do Makerfield residents think of the Burnham-prompted by-election?
item.description: What do Makerfield residents think of the Burnham-prompted by-election?

item.title: ITVX: Peston: Will Starmer announce a departure timetable sooner than people think? - ITVX
item.description: Peston: Will Starmer announce a departure timetable sooner than people think? - ITVX
